productDisplayName: Carlton London Women Casual Black Flats
description: Look adorable in this pair of classic, Greek-inspired sandals from carlton london. The woven and braided midfoot straps and adjustable backfoot buckle offer a comfortable Fit and a contemporary glamourous look. Slip into them with a flowy dress and a shoulder bag, and enjoy those shopping sprees in the winter sun in comfort and style.UpperSynthetic leather woven straps on the midfoot, with an ankle buckle strap to customise fit and lock the foot in placeSoft footbed for all-day comfort OutsoleLightweight durable PU outsole with a rubber heel unit that has horizontal grooves for absolute grip and tractionSandal careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
